title: macroptilium lathyroides var. semierectum
intro: Macroptilium lathyroides var. semierectum, also known as the upright horsebean, is a variety of climbing or semi-erect legume native to Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Macroptilium lathyroides var. semierectum include its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Macroptilium lathyroides var. semierectum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
